# terrible_cisco_meraki_networks_wireless_clients_connection_stats_info (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `apTag` (String) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. ApTag query parameter. Filter results by AP Tag.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `band` (String) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. Band query parameter. Filter results by band (either '2.4', '5' or '6'). Note that data prior to February 2020 will not have band information.
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `clientId` (String) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. ClientId path parameter. Client ID.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `headers` (String) Additional headers.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `networkId` (String) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. NetworkId path parameter. Network ID.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `ssid` (Number) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. Ssid query parameter. Filter results by SSID.
- `t0` (String) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. T0 query parameter. The beginning of the timespan for the data. The maximum lookback period is 180 days from today.
- `t1` (String) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. T1 query parameter. The end of the timespan for the data. T1 can be a maximum of 7 days after t0.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `timespan` (Number) Information module for Networks Wireless Clients Connectionstats Info. Timespan query parameter. The timespan for which the information will be fetched. If specifying timespan, do not specify parameters t0 and t1. The value must be in seconds and be less than or equal to 7 days.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `meraki_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco Meraki Python SDK
